title: Skye 的 iPhone 人工智能主屏应用程序在推出前获得投资者支持
content: Skye 的新人工智能应用程序在推出之前就吸引了投资者——这表明人们对更具人工智能意识的 iPhone 感兴趣。
original_title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
original_content: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

title: DeepSeek 新模型重要的三个原因
content: 4月24日，中国人工智能公司DeepSeek发布了其期待已久的新旗舰机型V4的预览。该模型可以处理比上一代更长的提示，这要归功于新的设计，有助于它更有效地处理大量文本。与 DeepSeek 之前的型号一样，V4 是开放式的
original_title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
original_content: On April 24, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. The model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: 幂律的力量：不对称性促进组合推理
content:
arXiv:2604.22951v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：自然语言数据遵循幂律分布，大多数知识和技能出现的频率非常低。虽然普遍的直觉表明，重新加权或整理数据以使其趋于均匀分布可能有助于模型更好地学习
original_title: The Power of Power Law: Asymmetry Enables Compositional Reasoning
original_content:
arXiv:2604.22951v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Natural language data follows a power-law distribution, with most knowledge and skills appearing at very low frequency. While a common intuition suggests that reweighting or curating data towards a uniform distribution may help models better learn the

title: GCA-BULF：使用分组关键设备进行短期负荷预测的自下而上框架
content:
arXiv:2604.24766v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：随着分时电价和阶梯电价的兴起，鼓励能源消费者通过自动控制大功率电器来采取错峰策略。这些有助于降低能源成本，同时增强电网的稳定性
original_title: GCA-BULF: A Bottom-Up Framework for Short-Term Load Forecasting Using Grouped Critical Appliances
original_content:
arXiv:2604.24766v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: With the rise of time-of-use and tiered electricity pricing, energy consumers are encouraged to adopt peak-shifting strategies by automatically controlling high-power appliances. These help lower energy costs while enhancing the power grid's stability

title: 亚马逊在产品页面推出人工智能驱动的音频问答体验
content: 亚马逊的新“加入聊天”功能可让您提出有关产品的问题并接收人工智能驱动的音频回复。
original_title: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
original_content: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.

title: 红帽的 OpenClaw 维护者刚刚使企业 Claw 部署更加安全
content: Tank OS 将 OpenClaw AI 代理放入容器中，使其运行更可靠、更安全，特别是对于那些运行它们的舰队的人来说。
original_title: Red Hat’s OpenClaw maintainer just made enterprise Claw deployments a lot safer
original_content: Tank OS puts OpenClaw AI agents into a container that lets it run reliably and more safely, especially for those running fleets of them.
